items.claim: Steve Garcia would knock out Vinicius.
items.quote: I feel like Steve Garcia knocks him out.

items.claim: Mosquita is vulnerable to being rocked in fights.
items.quote: Mosquita is human. She just looked really great against Random. She got rocked by Mullins.

items.claim: Charles Jourdain is not as effective at 135 pounds.
items.quote: Charles Jordan ain't as dope at 135.

items.claim: Raul Rosas Jr. is a high-level top control specialist and grappler.
items.quote: He's a good [ __ ] wrestler, grappler. He's a good top control specialist.

items.claim: Gandra is a pressure fighter who relies on chaotic, wild striking.
items.quote: Gandra slugs bombs and brings pressure... he's a blitzing bomber and he just throws chaotic wild shots

items.claim: Gandra will defeat Zack Reese by finishing him with strikes.
items.quote: I just think Gandra's about to dog walk Zack Reese and just unload [ __ ] hammers on his face.
